team_chat_note:
TLDR: Partial fit on written evidence; several core JD/rubric signals are missing or unclear.
Estimated match: 45%

- Evidence: relevant UI/UX material found in attachments.
- Strengths: portfolio/resume has some relevant UX/product signal.
- Gaps / follow-up: direct 1:1 matching/recommendation UX is not clearly shown; paywall/subscription/premium-conversion UX is not clearly shown; hypothesis/data-driven experimentation evidence is limited.
strict_team_chat_note:
TLDR: Weak strict-fit signal from the extracted documents.
Strict estimated match: 30%

- Evidence: no strong keyword evidence found in extracted text.
- Strong signals: No strong differentiating signal found in extracted text.
- Main concerns: 3+ years UI/UX experience is not clearly proven in extracted text; no clear 1:1 matching/dating/recommendation UX evidence; no clear paywall/subscription/payment-conversion ownership.
